resource.name: noGraderInSystem
resource.object: Grader not found in grading system.

resource.name: generalError
resource.object: General error occurred while preparing screen.

resource.name: SaveChangesPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to save changes?"

resource.name: cloneProgramError
resource.object: An error ocurred while cloning program.

resource.name: UpdateProgramError
resource.object: An error occurred while applying changes to production.

resource.name: ProgramConfigurationError
resource.object: Unable to initialize grading program form. Batch Mode missing.

resource.name: CorrectValue
resource.object: Do you want to correct the value?

resource.name: NoAlgorithmSelected
resource.object: No algorithm for batch mode selected.

resource.name: ChangeBatchModeWarning
resource.object: Changing the batch mode will clear all batch settings for the selected product.\n\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: NotSamePrunitGraderType
resource.object: Process unit {0} can't be selected for this program.

resource.name: GetPrunitGraderInfoError
resource.object: An error occured while getting grader information from process unit.

resource.name: NoGraderForPrunit
resource.object: No grader found with chosen process unit.

resource.name: ConfirmDeleteRecord
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the program?

resource.name: AddGraderAlgorithmSupportError
resource.object: An error occurred while adding algorithm support for the new grader.

resource.name: ConfirmDeleteRecord
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the system?

resource.name: Alarm.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device is not supported for alarm import.

resource.name: RefreshControlScreenException
resource.object: An error occurred while refreshing the control screen.

resource.name: ConfigurationError
resource.object: Unable to setup graders control screen. Invalid configuration.

resource.name: InitializeError
resource.object: Error occurred while initializing graders controlscreen.

resource.name: BatchCount.ToolTip
resource.object: Total batch count for process period

resource.name: BatchWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Total batch weight for process period

resource.name: PieceCount.ToolTip
resource.object: Total piece count for process period

resource.name: PieceWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Total piece weight for process period

resource.name: BatchMeanWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Mean batch weight for process period

resource.name: PieceMeanWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Mean piece weight for process period

resource.name: TotalWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Total piece weight over the process period

resource.name: TotalPieces.ToolTip
resource.object: Total pieces over the process period

resource.name: TerminatAllBatches
resource.object: This operation will terminate all batches on the grader.\nAre you sure want to continue?

resource.name: TerminatBatchOnGatePrompt
resource.object: Do you want to terminate batch on the gate?

resource.name: ErrorSavingControlScreen
resource.object: An error occurred while saving control screen.

resource.name: DeviceOffline
resource.object: Grader device must be configured and online in order to load tray patterns.

resource.name: dataweightresunit
resource.comments: Weight resolution unit in database registrations.

resource.name: dataheightresunit
resource.comments: Height resolution unit in database registrations.

resource.name: datawidthresunit
resource.comments: Width resolution unit in database registrations.

resource.name: datalengthresunit
resource.comments: Length resolution unit in database registrations.

resource.name: deletePalletPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected pallet(s)?

resource.name: otherPalletRegistered
resource.object: Another pallet is already registered at the gate..

resource.name: selectGatePrompt
resource.object: Select gate for detailed gate information

resource.name: createProcessUnitClientError
resource.object: Unabel to connect to process manager

resource.name: noGraderInSystem
resource.object: Grader not found in grading system.

resource.name: ExportNoProductsInProgram
resource.object: Export failed. No products in program.

resource.name: ImportProductNotFoundInSystem
resource.object: Import failed. Product not found in system.

resource.name: ImportProgramNotFoundInSystem
resource.object: Import failed. Program not found in system.

resource.name: ImportProgramNotFoundOnDevice
resource.object: Import failed. Program not found on device.

resource.name: ImportUnknown
resource.object: Import failed for an unknown reason.

resource.name: GraderInput.Hint
resource.object: Shows a input history graph for grader

resource.name: GraderThroughput.Hint
resource.object: Shows a throughput graph for grader

resource.name: PackHistory.Hint
resource.object: Shows an overview of packs created by a grader.

resource.name: WeightDistribution.Hint
resource.object: Shows a weight distribution graph for grader

resource.name: Grades.Hint
resource.object: Shows a table overview for grades

resource.name: Gates.Hint
resource.object: Shows a table overview for gates

resource.name: GatesVertical.Hint
resource.object: Shows gates info as vertical grid

resource.name: RejectRateLabel.Hint
resource.object: Show reject rate as percentage in a label

resource.name: ThroughputGauge.Hint
resource.object: Show current througput in a gauge

resource.name: ThroughputLabel.Hint
resource.object: Show current througput in a label

resource.name: WeightMeanLabel.Hint
resource.object: Shows the current mean weight in a label

resource.name: NoService
resource.object: No grader service can not refresh

resource.name: RefreshError_Message
resource.object: Fatal error while refreshing data \r\n Continue refreshing ?

resource.name: NoService
resource.object: No grader service can not refresh

resource.name: GraderKPI.Hint
resource.object: Creates a component to view grader key performance indicators.

resource.name: WeightLabel.Hint
resource.object: Shows the current accepted weight in a label

resource.name: PiecesLabel.Hint
resource.object: Shows count of accepted pieces in a label

resource.name: Terminate.Text
resource.object: Do you wish to terminate batch for gate {0}?

resource.name: TerminateAll.Text
resource.object: Do you wish to terminate all batches?

resource.name: LDistribution.Hint
resource.object: Shows a CL distribution graph for grader

resource.name: PackClHistory.Hint
resource.object: Shows CL overview of packs created by a grader.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionCut
resource.object: Item ordered as cut and matching expected weight.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionCutLowWeight
resource.object: Item ordered as cut with weight below expected.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionCutTrimAttached
resource.object: Item ordered as cut with weight above expected.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionNotCut
resource.object: Item ordered as not cut and matching expected weight.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionNotCutHighWeight
resource.object: Item Ordered as not cut with weight above expected.

resource.name: CategoryTooltipPortionNotCutLowWeight
resource.object: Item ordered as not cut with weight below expected.

resource.name: MaxTrimPercent.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum allowed weight of the trim piece in percent of the whole item weight.

resource.name: MinTrimWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Minimum allowed weight of the trim piece.

resource.name: MinItemWeightToCut.ToolTip
resource.object: Minimum item allowed reducing by means of trim.

resource.name: MaxItemWeightToCut.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum item allowed reducing by means of trim.

resource.name: DownSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Items are downsized to fit inside recipe item weight range to meet disposition on recipe.

resource.name: BestChoice.ToolTip
resource.object: If assigned at design, but rejected at run time, find open batch (tolerance recipe) by Best Choice.

resource.name: FatalErrorWhileSettingUpForCategorySelect
resource.object: Fatal error while setting up for Category select

resource.name: ChangesNotCommittedToTheDatabase
resource.object: Changes not committed to the database

resource.name: RecipeNotDeletedUsedAsDefaultReipeByGrade
resource.object: Recipe not deleted, use as default reipe by grade(s)

resource.name: Dialog.DeleteRecipe.Text
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected recipe?

resource.name: Dialog.DeleteProgram.Text
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected product setup?

resource.name: FailedDeleteRecipe
resource.object: Failed to delete recipe on device.

resource.name: InvalidConfigForProductRecipesProgram
resource.object: Error in The system configuration - the ProductRecipeProgram is invalid

resource.name: RecipeDefinitionIsInvalid
resource.object: Error in the received recipe (can not parse it)

resource.name: CanNotCreateOrFindRecipeInInnova
resource.object: Can not find / create the recipe in Innova

resource.name: CanNotDeleteRecipeOnRoboBatcher
resource.object: Can not delete the recipe on the RoboBatcher

resource.name: CanNotExportRecipeWithNewInnovaId
resource.object: Can not export the receipe back to the RoboBatcher

resource.name: InternalErrorCantUpdateRecipeOnRoboBatcher
resource.object: Internal Error - Cant Update Recipe On RoboBatche

resource.name: ValidationError
resource.object: The device reports error in the recipe definition

resource.name: RecipeControl.Hint
resource.object: Creates a layout for RoboBatcherFlex recipe control
